about.body.p1: CS & Data Analytics undergraduate at IIT Patna (CPI 8.7) building systems at the intersection of software engineering, machine learning, and data analysis. I design tools that turn complex data into clear, actionable insight.
about.body.p2: Recently shipped a Dollar Hegemony analysis system (XGBoost + LSTM + Transformer), a full-stack India Crime Analytics platform, and an AI fitness tracker — FitoGlobe. Always building something. Outside of tech, I follow cricket, dig into financial data, and keep a close eye on global markets.

project.aqi.title: Air Pollution in India — 2024
project.aqi.desc: Interactive Power BI dashboard analyzing AQI, PM2.5, PM10, and pollution trend data across major Indian cities. Custom DAX measures and dynamic filtering for regional comparison.
project.portfolio.title: Personal Portfolio Website
project.portfolio.desc: Personal developer portfolio built from scratch using HTML for the structured page layout, CSS for styling, visual grid design, and responsive interface, and JavaScript for interactive navigation, dynamic UI behavior, and smooth section-based SPA transitions.
project.dollar.title: Dollar Hegemony — BRICS vs G7 Analysis
project.dollar.desc: End-to-end ML research system quantifying US Dollar dominance impact on BRICS economies. Built a novel Dollar Stress Index (DSI) from scratch. Three-model pipeline — XGBoost with SHAP interpretability, LSTM for sequential forecasting, and a multi-country Transformer with cross-country attention. Blended via Ridge meta-ensemble. Live interactive dashboard with 7 tabs and FastAPI backend.
project.crime.title: India Crime Analytics Dashboard
project.crime.desc: Crime intelligence platform built on NCRB data — 755,380+ crimes tracked across 28 states + UTs spanning 7 years. Features 11 analytics modules: interactive SVG India map color-coded by crime risk, trend analysis, state report cards, and side-by-side state comparisons. Includes Groq AI chatbot for natural-language crime queries and an emergency helplines directory.
project.fitoglobe.title: FitoGlobe — AI Fitness Tracker
project.fitoglobe.desc: Multilingual AI fitness companion supporting 4 languages (EN / ES / JA / KO) with auto-detected units (kg/lbs) by country. Tracks workouts, logs nutrition with macro calculator, and delivers personalized coaching via Groq AI chatbot and food scanner. Full authentication with JWT + Google OAuth.
